title: Effectiveness of interventions to address moral distress in nursing students: An integrative review.
summary: Moral distress is an increasing concern in nursing education, with evidence that it may undermine learning, ethical confidence, and early professional identity formation. title: Health Professional Students' Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence During Clinical Placements: Cross-Sectional Online Survey Study.

title: A Pilot Study Exploring the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence in Nursing Education.

title: When AI Joins the Classroom: Lessons From UK Medical Students.
